HOW IT WORKS

Three steps to a site
that sells for you

1

Book a Free Call

We start with a quick call to understand your business, your goals, and what a stronger website should do for you.

2

We Build Your Site

Our team builds a professional, conversion-focused website tailored to your brand, industry, and market.

3

Ongoing Management

We manage and update your site as your business grows, keeping it optimised as search and AI continue to evolve.

and manage every day.

COMMON QUESTIONS

Everything you need to know

How does the process start?

It starts with a free discovery call. We learn about your business, your goals, and what's not working with your current online presence.

Do you only build the site, or manage it too?

Both. We build it and manage it on an ongoing basis — updates, SEO tweaks, performance improvements, all included.

How do you help with SEO and AI search visibility?

Every site we build is structured for both traditional search engines and the new wave of AI-powered search tools. Your business gets found.

How fast can a site go live?

Most sites are live within 7–14 days of our kick-off call, depending on complexity.

What kinds of businesses do you work with?

Any local or service-based business that needs a professional web presence — trades, agencies, consultants, retail, hospitality, and more.

Still have questions? Email us at info@sitecosmos.com

Your competitors already
have better websites.

Book a short call and we'll walk through exactly what we'd build and manage for your business.
